name: void-arena-bot
description: Void Arena 5.1.3: placar Rematch com filas 3x3/5x5, ranking individual e patentes.

scripts.start: node bot/patch-storage-event-fields.js && node bot/patch-match-results-history.js && node bot/patch-internal-event-notifications.js && node bot/patch-placar-internal-api.js && node bot/patch-event-validation-and-category.js && node bot/patch-match-voice-channels.js && node bot/index.js
